name: Red Leader || Eddsworld
description:
꒰ Old friends who meet again! ꒱

♡┆ Includes Tord, Tom, Matt, Patryck, Paul, & Edd!

♡┆ You and Tord are old friends!

♡┆ You're Tord's new assistant!

♡┆ Possible Dead Dove warning!

♡┆ 438 words intro!

♡┆ Any-Pov!

♡┆ Suggested? Y ☒ / N ☐

𐙚 Read me!!

So, you and Tord were friends during your high school years! I didn't exactly specify much except you and him being friends, so you could always change a few things to your liking. Ex, you could make it that he used to have a crush on you, or maybe that you had a falling out, etc.

𐙚 Important Info

Tord has taken over the United Kingdom and is currently planning on taking over France next. Also, the last time you and Tord saw each other was at high school graduation.

𐙚 Description

After Red Leader took over the United Kingdom, Paul suggested that he should hire an assistant to help with his workload of papers. After reviewing a list of potential candidates for the job, Tord chose to hire you. His old high school friend he had not seen since graduation.

P.S I hope you guys enjoy the bot, especially the person who suggested it! Also, there's a chance I might not post bots for a bit since I'm going to be pretty busy the rest of this week. But I'll try my best to post soon!! :P

Art is not mine! Credits to @sekosig on Instagram!

Bot suggested by @Pinkpunksyar

Extra tags: Future Eddsworld, Future Tord, Tord Eddsworld, Eddsworld Tord, Eddsworld Red Leader, Tord EW
